zh.lifeSummary: 當Jenet Elizabeth Bosome於1420年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親John Bozum30歲，母親Joan Fortescue15歲。她於1439年與Baldwin Fulford在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年之前在英國英格蘭戴文希林福德，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Bosome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bonham
meanings: nickname from Old French bon homme ‘good man’ (from Latin bonus homo), or from a Middle English personal name of the same etymology.
possibly also a habitational name from Bonham in Stourton (Wiltshire), which is likely manorial in origin, taking its name from that of an early owner with the same name as in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Jenet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Jennet
meanings: Either a simplified spelling of   Jeannette   or a revival of a medieval pet form of the female name   Jean .

variants.name: Ginnette
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Jeanette
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jeannette  , in the 1920s and 30s associated particularly with the Americam singer and film star  Jeanette MacDonald  (  1902–65 ).

variants.name: Jeanett
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jenet Elizabeth Bosome was born in 1420, in Devon, England, her father, John Bozum, was 30 and her mother, Joan Fortescue, was 15. She married Baldwin Fulford in 1439, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 1478, in Shillingford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jenet Elizabeth Bosome est née en 1420, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Bozum, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Fortescue, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Baldwin Fulford en 1439, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1478, à Shillingford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jenet Elizabeth Bosome 1420 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bozum 30 und ihre Mutter Joan Fortescue 15. Sie hat 1439 in Devon, England Baldwin Fulford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1478 in Shillingford, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jenet Elizabeth Bosome è nata il nel 1420 nel Devon, England, sua padre, John Bozum, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joan Fortescue, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Baldwin Fulford nel 1439, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1478, nel Shillingford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Jenet Elizabeth Bosomeが1420年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Bozumは30歳，母Joan Fortescueは15歳であった。1439年にイギリスデボンでBaldwin Fulfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年以前にイギリスイギリスデボンシュイリングフォードで死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jenet Elizabeth Bosome(이)가 1420년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bozum(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Fortescue(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 데폰에서 Baldwin Fulford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 시링퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jenet Elizabeth Bosome nasceu em 1420, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bozum, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fortescue, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Baldwin Fulford em 1439, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1478, em Shillingford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jenet Elizabeth Bosome родилась в 1420 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bozum было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Fortescue, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baldwin Fulford в 1439 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1478 г. в местности шиллингфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Baldwin Fulford en 1439, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1478, en Shillingford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
